user.title: HomGar
user.description: Set up your HomGar or RainPoint account to control your irrigation devices.

data_description.app_code: App code mapping: 1 = HomGar, 2 = RainPoint, 4 = RainPoint Agri.
data_description.area_code: Phone country code for the account, for example 1 = US/Canada, 31 = Netherlands, 33 = France.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to HomGar API
error.no_homes: No homes found in your account

init.title: HomGar Options
init.description: Configure options for your HomGar integration.

data_description.app_code: App code mapping: 1 = HomGar, 2 = RainPoint, 4 = RainPoint Agri.
data_description.area_code: Phone country code for the account, for example 1 = US/Canada, 31 = Netherlands, 33 = France.

start_irrigation.name: Start Irrigation
start_irrigation.description: Start irrigation for a specific zone with configurable duration.

stop_irrigation.name: Stop Irrigation
stop_irrigation.description: Stop irrigation for a specific zone.
